## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Datagrid and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, SEO performance, and ongoing initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/m26zhwkENvxaSMt1HoqzhqKUSnx3m6mS?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content production on track: 400 articles to be published by Saturday](https://fathom.video/share/m26zhwkENvxaSMt1HoqzhqKUSnx3m6mS?tab=summary&timestamp=56.0)
  - [SEO performance showing positive trends: significant rise in impressions, specialized/technical topics ranking well](https://fathom.video/share/m26zhwkENvxaSMt1HoqzhqKUSnx3m6mS?tab=summary&timestamp=155.0)
  - [JTBD workstream progressing: George & Jason scheduling refinement call with Thiago](https://fathom.video/share/m26zhwkENvxaSMt1HoqzhqKUSnx3m6mS?tab=summary&timestamp=868.0)
  - [Website dev transition: Noor left, Tejas catching up; some tasks pending upgrade](https://fathom.video/share/m26zhwkENvxaSMt1HoqzhqKUSnx3m6mS?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)

## Topics

### Content & Website Updates

  - [400 articles to be published by Saturday](https://fathom.video/share/m26zhwkENvxaSMt1HoqzhqKUSnx3m6mS?tab=summary&timestamp=56.0)
  - [Website dev transition: Noor left, Tejas catching up](https://fathom.video/share/m26zhwkENvxaSMt1HoqzhqKUSnx3m6mS?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Use case and industry pages currently locked](https://fathom.video/share/m26zhwkENvxaSMt1HoqzhqKUSnx3m6mS?tab=summary&timestamp=92.0)
  - [Main block categories update pending plan upgrade](https://fathom.video/share/m26zhwkENvxaSMt1HoqzhqKUSnx3m6mS?tab=summary&timestamp=108.0)
  - [Automated publishing into Datagrid's CMS implemented](https://fathom.video/share/m26zhwkENvxaSMt1HoqzhqKUSnx3m6mS?tab=summary&timestamp=124.0)

### SEO Performance

  - [Significant rise in impressions (turquoise line in graph)](https://fathom.video/share/m26zhwkENvxaSMt1HoqzhqKUSnx3m6mS?tab=summary&timestamp=155.0)
  - [Clicks lagging due to AI overviews taking up SERP real estate](https://fathom.video/share/m26zhwkENvxaSMt1HoqzhqKUSnx3m6mS?tab=summary&timestamp=204.0)
  - [New clusters (4 weeks old) showing promise: low clicks, but impressions taking off](https://fathom.video/share/m26zhwkENvxaSMt1HoqzhqKUSnx3m6mS?tab=summary&timestamp=252.0)
  - [Top-performing keywords: AI CRM automation, AI tools for financial advisors, AI agent implementation](https://fathom.video/share/m26zhwkENvxaSMt1HoqzhqKUSnx3m6mS?tab=summary&timestamp=283.0)
  - [70 keywords ranking in positions 1-3, 468 in positions 4-10](https://fathom.video/share/m26zhwkENvxaSMt1HoqzhqKUSnx3m6mS?tab=summary&timestamp=366.0)
  - [High visibility for insurance automation; lagging in broader financial services automation](https://fathom.video/share/m26zhwkENvxaSMt1HoqzhqKUSnx3m6mS?tab=summary&timestamp=457.0)
  - [Top use cases: document processing, workflow automation, data entry, competitor tracking](https://fathom.video/share/m26zhwkENvxaSMt1HoqzhqKUSnx3m6mS?tab=summary&timestamp=469.0)
  - [Top landing pages: insurance document processing, competitor tracking, insurance, claim form processing](https://fathom.video/share/m26zhwkENvxaSMt1HoqzhqKUSnx3m6mS?tab=summary&timestamp=491.0)

### Keyword Deep Dive

  - [Specialized and technical automation topics ranking better](https://fathom.video/share/m26zhwkENvxaSMt1HoqzhqKUSnx3m6mS?tab=summary&timestamp=754.0)
  - [Granular, use case-specific content performing well (e.g., construction, insurance industries)](https://fathom.video/share/m26zhwkENvxaSMt1HoqzhqKUSnx3m6mS?tab=summary&timestamp=773.0)
  - [Keyword intent analysis: automation queries dominate](https://fathom.video/share/m26zhwkENvxaSMt1HoqzhqKUSnx3m6mS?tab=summary&timestamp=707.0)
  - [Keyword clusters: insurance automation, integrations, report writing, data entry, competitive tracking](https://fathom.video/share/m26zhwkENvxaSMt1HoqzhqKUSnx3m6mS?tab=summary&timestamp=735.0)
